name: Divider
visual_summary: A Divider is a horizontal or vertical line used to separate content. Use it to create visual separation between elements in your application. Typically used in lists, headers, or footers.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Divider
Description: A Divider is a horizontal or vertical line used to separate content. Use it to create visual separation between elements in your application. Typically used in lists, headers, or footers.
Style: e.g. minimal, bare
Interactions: 
Tags: component, layout, ui

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
